summary: Document Readiness Engine testing complete. All 45 tests pass (24 unit + 21 API). All endpoints functional: /api/readiness/metrics, /queue, /evaluate/{id}, /batch. ReadinessPanel UI displays correctly on document detail page with status badge, confidence bar, blocking/warning reasons, next steps, and 11 signal chips.
seed_data_creation: 79 documents batch-evaluated. Distribution: 44 blocked, 29 needs_review, 4 ready_auto_link, 2 ambiguous, 0 ready_auto_draft
context_for_next_testing_agent: Document Readiness Engine fully operational. Key verified features: (1) GET /api/readiness/metrics returns total_documents, by_status, by_action, top_blocking_reasons, top_warning_reasons, top_reviewer_actions, confidence_by_status, (2) GET /api/readiness/queue returns documents with readiness data and supports ?status and ?action filters, (3) POST /api/readiness/evaluate/{doc_id} evaluates single documents, (4) POST /api/readiness/batch backfills all documents, (5) Readiness object has all required fields: status, confidence, recommended_action, blocking_reasons, warning_reasons, required_reviewer_actions, explanations, signals (11 booleans), last_evaluated_at, reviewed_override, (6) Frontend ReadinessPanel on DocumentDetailPage shows status badge, confidence bar, blocking reasons, warnings, next steps, signals chips. No breaking changes to existing APIs (dashboard/stats, aliases/metrics, vendor-resolution/metrics, health all work).

coverage: TestComputeSignals (11 tests): fully_resolved, vendor_unresolved, duplicate_risk, policy_blocked, policy_held, graph_linked, line_items, no_line_items, po_resolved, missing_required_fields, manually_overridden

TestEvaluateReadiness (11 tests): ready_auto_draft, blocked_duplicate, blocked_policy, blocked_missing_fields, needs_review_low_vendor_confidence, ready_auto_link, ambiguous_many_warnings, confidence_bounds, signals_included, empty_doc, reviewed_override
TestReadinessMetrics (4 tests): returns_200, response_structure, by_status_structure, total_documents
TestReadinessQueue (7 tests): returns_200, response_structure, document_has_readiness, filter_by_status_blocked, filter_by_status_needs_review, filter_by_action, pagination
TestNonRegression (4 tests): dashboard_stats, aliases_metrics, vendor_resolution_metrics, health
